name: rad-coolify-orchestrator
description: End-to-end Coolify self-hosted PaaS management — deployments (Nixpacks/Dockerfile/Compose/pre-built), databases (provisioning/backups/SSL), security (secrets/RBAC/network isolation), CI/CD (API/GitHub Actions/GHCR/webhooks), troubleshooting (502/504/SSL/build failures/container lifecycle), observability (Sentinel/log drains/Uptime Kuma), and multi-server infrastructure (Swarm/build servers). Covers Coolify v4 self-hosted. Not for Coolify Cloud.
